title: notogrammitis rawlingsii
intro: Notogrammitis rawlingsii, also known as Rawlings' notogrammitis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Notogrammitis rawlingsii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
